title: Light Fermented Ethiopian Tortilla Stir-fry
description: A comforting gluten-free Ethiopian dish featuring fermented tortillas that are stir-fried and served with a light sauce for a delightful breakfast or snack.
instructions: Preheat sous-vide machine to 70°C (158°F) for vacuum-sealed tortillas.
Place fermented tortillas in a sous-vide bag and seal it. Cook for 30 minutes at the preheated temperature.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add minced garlic, green onions, and red bell pepper to sauté until fragrant and softened.
Remove tortillas from the oven and place them on a clean plate. Drizzle with olive oil and serve the stir-fry mixture alongside the tortillas.
Enjoy your Light Fermented Ethiopian Tortilla Stir-fry as an accompaniment to yogurt or served over a bed of greens.
